title: thuinos #2367
definition:
1) the citrus, an odoriferous North African tree used as incense,
    prized by the ancient Greeks and Romans on account of the beauty of
    its wood for various ornamental purposes
nasbUsage:

    prized by the ancient Greeks and Romans on account of the beauty of
